common.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.banned: Your account has been suspended. Contact support.

start.choose_language:
Welcome to {app}! 🚗
Please choose your language:
start.welcome_driver:
Hi {name}! 👋

Share your live location and I'll find parking spots near you.

Use the menu below to get started.
start.welcome_back:
Welcome back{name}! 👋

Tap below to find available parking near you.
start.menu_ready: 📋 Your menu is ready below — it's there whenever you need it.

nearby.ask_location: 📍 Tap the button below to share your location, and I'll find nearby parking.
nearby.none_found: No available parking found within {radius} km. Try moving the search area or check back later.
nearby.map_cta: 🅿️ Found {count} spot(s) near you — tap to see them on the map:
nearby.map_header: 🅿️ Found {count} available spot(s) near you. Numbers below match the map 👇
nearby.map_header_far: No spots within {radius} km — here are the {count} closest (nearest is {distance} away). Numbers match the map 👇
nearby.results_header_far: No spots within {radius} km, but here are the closest ones (nearest is {distance} away):

browse.pick_area: 🗺️ Pick an area to browse parking spots:
browse.none_in_area: No available spots found in {area} right now.

booking.choose_start: When do you want to start parking?
booking.confirm_pending_note: Payment will be added in the next step. For now this just reserves the spot.
booking.next_step: Next step: complete your payment to confirm this booking.
booking.conflict_full: Sorry, this spot just got fully booked for that time. Please pick another spot or time.
booking.spot_unavailable: This spot is no longer available. Please choose another.

help.text:
{app} helps you find and book parking in Addis Ababa.

• 🅿️ Find parking — share your location to see nearby spots
• 📋 My bookings — see your reservations
• 🏠 List your spot — earn money renting your parking
• 🌐 Language — switch between English and Amharic

Need help? Contact support.

host.start_intro: 🏠 Let's list your parking spot. You can tap Cancel any time.
host.ask_location: 📍 Share the location of your spot — use the button below, or drop a pin on the map.
host.need_location: Please share the spot's location using the button below (or send a map pin).
host.ask_address: ✍️ Send a short name or address for the spot (e.g. "Edna Mall parking"), or tap Skip.
host.ask_price: 💵 What's the price per hour, in {currency}? (e.g. 40)
host.bad_price: Please send a valid price greater than 0 — e.g. 40.
host.ask_capacity: 🚗 How many cars can park here? Tap a number below or type one.
host.bad_capacity: Please send a whole number of cars (1–1000).
host.ask_amenities: ✨ Any amenities? Tap to toggle, then Continue.
host.ask_photo: 📷 Send a photo of the spot, or tap Skip.
host.need_photo: Please send a photo, or tap Skip.
host.my_spots_empty: You haven't listed any spots yet. Tap "🏠 List your spot" to add one.
host.paused_ok: ⏸ Spot paused — it won't appear in searches.
host.edit_price_ask:
💵 Send the new price per hour in {currency} for:
{address}
host.bookings_empty: No upcoming bookings for this spot.

checkin.driver_notified: ✅ You've been checked in at {address}. Enjoy your parking!
checkin.not_completable: This booking can't be completed (already closed or not checked in).
checkin.err_not_found: This code is invalid or has expired.
checkin.err_not_owner: Only the spot's owner can check this booking in.
checkin.err_already: This booking is already checked in.
checkin.err_invalid_state: This booking is cancelled or already completed.

payment.choose_method: 💳 How would you like to pay?
payment.chapa_instructions: Tap the button below to pay securely via Telebirr, CBE Birr, or card. You'll be redirected to Chapa's secure checkout.
payment.manual_instructions:
Send {amount} {currency} to:

📱 Telebirr: +251-XXX-XXXXXX
🏦 CBE Account: 1000XXXXXXX

Reference: {code}

After payment, upload your receipt screenshot below.
payment.waiting_receipt: Please send a screenshot of your payment receipt.
payment.cancelled: ❌ Payment cancelled. Your reservation has been released.
payment.expired: ⏰ Payment window expired. Please book again.
payment.qr_instruction: Show this QR code to the host at the entrance.
payment.already_paid: This booking has already been paid.
payment.payment_failed: Payment failed. Please try again or choose manual transfer.
payment.verify_instructions: Tap below to verify your payment status:

rating.ask_comment: Add a comment (optional), or tap Skip:
rating.submitted: Thanks for your feedback! Your rating helps other drivers.
rating.booking_not_completed: You can only rate completed bookings.
rating.error_generic: Failed to submit rating. Please try again.

notification.checkin_prompt:
✅ Your booking at {address} is starting now!

Show the QR code below to the host.
notification.booking_cancelled_timeout:
❌ Booking {code} has been cancelled due to payment timeout.

You can book again when ready.
notification.spot_available:
✅ Good news! A spot at {address} just became available!

You have {expires_minutes} minutes to book it before it's offered to the next person.

favorites.title: ⭐ Your Favorite Spots:
favorites.empty: You haven't added any favorites yet. When viewing a spot, tap the heart icon to save it for quick booking.
favorites.already_added: This spot is already in your favorites.

modification.choose_hours: How many hours would you like to extend?
modification.cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this booking?
modification.refund_full: 💰 Full refund (100%) - More than 24 hours before start time.
modification.refund_partial: 💰 Partial refund (50%) - Less than 24 hours before start time.
modification.refund_none: ⚠️ No refund - Less than 2 hours before start time.
modification.invalid_status: This booking cannot be modified in its current status.
modification.slot_unavailable: Sorry, the time slot is no longer available.

waitlist.join_prompt:
This spot is fully booked for your selected time.

Would you like to join the waitlist? You'll be notified if a spot opens up.
waitlist.joined: ✅ You've joined the waitlist! We'll notify you when a spot becomes available.
waitlist.already_on: You're already on the waitlist for this spot.

promo.not_yet_active: This promo code is not active yet.
promo.max_uses_reached: This promo code has reached its usage limit.
promo.minimum_not_met: Minimum booking amount not met for this promo code.

recurring.pattern_type: How often do you need this spot?
recurring.created: ✅ Recurring booking created! We'll automatically book this spot for you.
recurring.deactivated: ✅ Recurring booking stopped. No future bookings will be created.
